title: Elevator Cage
description:
A simple mod that adds a 1x1 Elevator Cage.  
Elevator Mechanics not included
body:
A small mod made with Blockbench and MCreator that adds blocks for making 1x1 elevators.\
Actual Elevator mechanics not included.

For the actual locomotion I would recommend [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) or [Moving Elevators](https://modrinth.com/mod/moving-elevators)

I made this after getting frustrated trying to make a small elevator with Create.\
I would not expect updates.\
Note that the side bars are solid, and cannot be reached between, except on the Open versions.

Included Content:

| Block/Item | Name | Description|
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
|![A block made of bars.  It has a floor and three walls.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7008d7965d5958fdcb78fb62042a51c16fbf7a1c.png) | Elevator Cage Bottom| The base of the cage.  The walls are solid. |
|![A block made of bars.  It has a ceiling and three walls.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1a218e47f49f43e59469facd343b73f31c9ad4f.png) | Elevator Cage Top | The top of the cage.  The walls are solid. |
|![A block made of bars.  It has three walls and an open top and bottom.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d9dad0dea925be82ce0821dd74b5448efe1af05.png)| Elevator Cage Middle | Middle part of the cage.  Really only needed if you're using a mod that makes you taller.  The walls are solid. |
| ![A single-block cage with one open side.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99ddccb26966a6dd782a1bb8fd4e94d9d31ec10e.png) | Miniature Elevator Cage | A single block form of the cage.  Again, only useful if you're playing with a mod that resizes you. |
| ![A simple handheld object that somewhat resembes a wrench.  I am not an artist.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd3e915a3cfcb2c7d1ff451add3f4803ee12516a.png) | Mini-Wrench | A simple wrench item.  Can rotate blocks horizontally. |


Each of the Elevator Blocks have Variants, which can be switched between freely in the Stonecutter.

Open:\
![A block made of bars.  It has a ceiling, and three walls with large openings.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd05c3724a216a7f35979a986b06f4d7e34560e2.png)\
Has open sides so passengers can reach for controls/buttons outside it.

Sided:\
![A block made of bars.  It has a ceiling and two walls. The Front and Back are open.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe5ed56f67fb5d413a7669d8ea9df8cdaa6df35a.png)\
Open in the Front and Back.

Fully Open:\
![A block frame made of thin bars.  The ceiling is a mesh, but there are no walls, just four thin poles in the corners.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3632600d59171eb7d5eedd1b6b7b353dfee8fd9.png)\
Unlike the Open variant, there is no bar to prevent you from walking in or out of any side.
